raw.subject: Your Santa Fe page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed the lovely display of local Santa Fe works of art at Madame Matisse - it's a great way to connect with the community. Your Black Angus heritage also shines through in the Santa Fe ranch photos you share.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might mean some potential customers are missing out on your cafe and bakery's offerings when they're searching online.

I sketched a simple homepage idea from what you post on Facebook, which includes a menu hero, hours block, photo gallery, and map & directions.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/madame-matisse-santa-fe

It's a straightforward project to bring it all together with a flat fee for local businesses. If you're interested in discussing details, I'd be happy to chat over a quick call or reply to this email.
